items.name: FadeConfig
comment: Soft fade at the top and bottom edges of the player.
Lines ease out as they approach the viewport edge.

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Whether to enable the edge fade.

fields.name: top
comment: A `%` value is relative to the viewport height.

fields.name: bottom
comment: A `%` value is relative to the viewport height.

items.name: Root
items.comment: Background fill and padding of the player.

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.comment: Background fill of the whole player.

fields.name: paddingX
comment: Horizontal padding on each side of the content.
A `%` value is relative to the viewport width.

fields.name: fade
fields.comment: Edge fade applied at the top and bottom of the player.
